meta.note: Edit this file to update your English resume. Run: node generate.js en

entries.institution: University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, Gies College of Business
entries.coursework: Corporate Finance, Managerial Accounting, Data Analytics, Supply Chain Management

entries.title: Lead Researcher
bullets: Led full-stack AI product development for restaurant management, covering inventory, training, operations, and marketing automation to enable comprehensive data collection across all touchpoints.
Designed Agentic Coding collaborative workflows (Claude Code based) to rapidly build MVPs and demos, creating an efficient product-to-field-feedback iteration flywheel.
Fine-tuned multimodal models and built AI workflows for intelligent surveillance inspection, generating area-level efficiency insights to help stores optimize operations.
Led hardware customization and design for kitchen-focused AI devices, closing the loop on back-of-house management and addressing restaurant brands' operational oversight gap.
Created lingtin.smartice.ai, a table-side AI conversation product, iterating to solve real-world issues including audio pickup, dialect recognition, and meeting-to-action closure.
Built a Xiaohongshu automated marketing AI that identifies market trends, generates acquisition posts from brand knowledge, and self-evolves through long-term post performance tracking.

entries.title: Independent Developer
bullets: Vibe Coded three MediaPipe biomechanics-based shooting analysis web apps, owning full product design, development, and iteration cycle solo.
Tested and iterated within private community; achieved 200 DAU within 3 days of launch, but stalled as real-time analysis models proved too demanding for frontend.

entries.title: Growth Analyst Intern
bullets: Enhanced Google SEO by 300% by creating Reddit strategy and collaborating with high-authority press & media.
Developed and executed an AI-driven Reddit growth strategy, integrating Crew.ai and Cursor (Python Reddit API Wrapper) to enhance engagement through a custom-trained Reddit bot.
Analyzed user behavior, bounce rate, retention funnel, and traffic sources via Mixpanel and Ahrefs to guide ad strategy.

entries.title: AI/ML Technical Consultant
bullets: Built a self-updating enterprise knowledge base using React + MongoDB, managing the full lifecycle from planning to production deployment.
Developed an automated scraping workflow in Python to collect and process research data on continuous manufacturing, enabling monthly auto-updates to the medical knowledge base.

entries.title: Investment Researcher (TMT)
bullets: Researched the pan-entertainment sector, leveraging Perplexity AI for market trend insights and Wind for financial data analysis, integrating findings from field investigations into reports.
Conducted field investigations at major retail locations in Shenzhen, tracking foot traffic (20k+), purchase rates, and customer demographics to evaluate market viability.

entries.title: Investment Analyst Intern
bullets: Communicated across departments of target companies to assess market penetration, key clients, technology barriers, and profitability.
Analyzed investment sectors using Wind; applied best-in-class benchmarking methodology to identify potential targets and authored investment reports.

entries.title: Go-To-Market Intern
bullets: Led strategic framework development to help clients identify alternative manufacturing locations outside China, evaluating cost structures, business risk rates, and tariff policies.
Built parametric cost models and recommended three country-regions by priority; findings were adopted into client corporate strategy.

entries.title: International Sales Consultant Intern
bullets: Led Infineon and Semikron sales negotiations, closing a ¥7M, 40% GPM prototype order through cost advantage positioning and securing Huawei Ventures investment.
Coordinated R&D and Sales teams to align product features with German market needs; facilitated client requirement sessions.

entries.title: Predictive Analytics Project
bullets: Used polynomial regression, gradient boosting, and random forest models in R to predict Illinois Cook County property prices, minimizing MSE through model comparison.

entries.title: Influencer (Kinesiology Channel)
bullets: Gained 8,000 followers, 500 private community members, and $2,000 in revenue within two months through kinesiology video content.

entries.title: Founder / Captain
bullets: Built the most competitive Chinese student basketball team at UIUC in 3 years across record, operations, and influence.
Secured ~$2,000 in sponsorships from local brands (Panda Express, FanTuan) in exchange for brand promotion.

entries.label: Tech Skills
entries.value: Python, SQL, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, R, Excel, Tableau, MySQL, AWS, Machine Learning Models.

entries.label: Tools
entries.value: Claude Code, Cursor, n8n, Comfy UI, React, MongoDB, Mixpanel, Ahrefs.

entries.label: General Skills
entries.value: Financial Statement Analysis, Scrum Framework, Risk Control, Variance Analysis, Inventory Control.

entries.label: Certifications
entries.value: Certified Scrum Product Owner (CSPO), Google AI Essentials.
